## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Code written and reviewed
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or plaintext credentials
- [ ] GitHub Actions pipeline passes (linting / tests)
- [ ] Container image successfully built and published to registry
- [ ] README / docs updated if needed
